name: Toby Henry
shortBio: Toby brings 20 years of tier-one management consulting experience—leading transformation programmes for some of the UK's largest organisations.
longBio: Toby brings 20 years of tier-one management consulting experience—leading transformation programmes for some of the UK's largest organisations. He's built and sold businesses, and knows what it takes to make change stick.

name: Andy Carroll
shortBio: Andy is a product and AI specialist with 17+ years across startups, banking, and consultancies.
longBio: Andy is a product and AI specialist with 17+ years across startups, banking, and consultancies. He builds the systems we recommend—hands-on, in the weeds, making things work.
